meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS launch. Learn to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to finally finish your project.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of early user validation and overwhelming feature creep. By implementing a focused, high-value onboarding flow, you force clarity on your core value proposition. This keeps users engaged, validates your business model immediately, and provides the momentum required to ship your MVP.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial spark of an idea, the flurry of late-night commits, and then the inevitable wall. The code becomes a labyrinth, the feature list bloats, and the momentum dies in the desert of 'almost finished.' You are not failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a bridge between your code and your first paying user.

User onboarding isn't just a UI task; it is your product's first sales pitch. By designing a high-velocity onboarding experience, you strip away the noise and focus exclusively on the core problem your product solves. Let’s stop building in a vacuum and start building for revenue.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides immediate value to your user. If they don't reach this in under 60 seconds, they churn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my core SaaS value proposition and define a 3-step 'Aha!' onboarding sequence that minimizes time-to-value for a non-technical user.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding-flow.md based on my product requirements'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Create a lean, distraction-free interface that guides the user toward the primary action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive React component for a multi-step onboarding modal using Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Implement Progress Tracking
steps.description: Psychological closure is key. Use progress bars to gamify the setup process and reduce abandonment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a progress bar component that updates based on the current step in the onboarding state.

steps.title: Automate Data Collection
steps.description: Use intelligent defaults to minimize form fields. Never ask for data you can infer or fetch via API.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a schema for onboarding data collection that utilizes smart defaults to reduce user friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding-hooks.ts for state management'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Ship the onboarding flow to a staging environment to observe user behavior before the full launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my onboarding code for potential bottlenecks and suggest performance optimizations.

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until the user has experienced at least one 'Aha!' moment.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates to make your onboarding feel instantaneous, even if backend calls are slow.
Limit your onboarding to 3 steps maximum; anything more increases churn exponentially.
Always include a 'Skip' button. If a user wants to explore, don't trap them in a tutorial.
Measure 'Time to Aha' rather than 'Time on Page' to track actual product success.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor your drop-off rates at each step. Use the feedback to iterate on your UI until at least 70% of signups complete the onboarding process.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects die in the draft folder. You have the tools, the roadmap, and the methodology to build a product that generates revenue. Don't wait for perfection; build for impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
